title: NEEDLE EXCHANGE - 211info
text: MULTNOMAH COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT NEEDLE EXCHANGE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Syringe exchange, naloxone and fentanyl test strips distribution. 619 NW 6th Avenue Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Thursday 11am-2pm, and 3pm-7pm Email (503) 988-7099 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 988-7099 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or walk in for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Multnomah County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Community Immunization Clinic is located on the 6th floor Services: Harm Reduction Test Strip Distribution Needle Exchange and Injection Supplies Opioid Antidote Distribution Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY PLANNING AND PUBLIC WORKS - SYRINGE DISPOSAL HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - HIV COMMUNITY TEST SITE HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - STD CLINIC PUBLIC SAFETY - MEDICATION & FIREARM SAFETY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MULTNOMAH COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT
